title: AstrBotDevs/AstrBot
summary: A multi-platform AI Agent framework integrating Discord, QQ, Telegram and multiple LLMs (GPT, Gemini, Llama, etc.), with a plugin architecture and MCP protocol support. Designed as an open-source alternative to closed-source assistants, it solves the cross-platform AI deployment and extension pain points. The unified abstraction layer allows dynamic model/IM switching.
